title: [oscore] Replace magic numbers with constants per RFC8613 and spec
description: Audit and update rust/oscore (or lichen-coap/oscore integration) for OSCORE option numbers, ID context, etc. Ensure no hardcoded values; align with spec/07-transport-app.md and test/vectors/oscore.json. Reference project-LICHEN-f4xg and project-LICHEN-s3t5.
